name: Rum Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions: Combine butter, sugar, and corn syrup in a saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the sugar dissolves. Allow mixture to cool slightly. Add eggs, rum, vanilla extract, and salt; stir well. Pour filling into prepared pastry shell. Top with pecan halves. Bake at 325°F for 50 to 55 minutes. Serve warm or cold. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
